headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Comcast (CMCSA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.22% and +2.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Earnings To Watch: Charter (CHTR) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow
summary: Cable, internet, and telephone services provider Charter (NASDAQ:CHTR) will be reporting earnings this Friday before market open. Here’s what to expect.
